name: Suspicious Kerberos RC4 Ticket Encryption
description: Detects Kerberos service ticket requests using the RC4 encryption type. The RC4 encryption type is considered weak and is often used by adversaries to perform Kerberoasting, a credential access technique used to crack service account passwords.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious **Kerberos service ticket request** using the weak **RC4 encryption type** was detected. This is a strong indicator of a **Kerberoasting** attack (**MITRE ATT&CK T1558.003**) where an adversary is attempting to crack service account passwords. The event occurred with Event ID **4769** and the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to change the passwords of any affected service accounts.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that requested the service ticket.
